records.question: Summarize the investment landscape across Olaya, Al_Naseem, and KAFD given these benchmarks and listings
records.answer: Olaya commands the highest premium at 12000 SAR/m2, with RYD-2014 undervalued at 9000 (25% discount). Al_Naseem remains the most affordable district at 3800 SAR/m2 average, with RYD-2015 in line with market. KAFD shows strong commercial demand at 9000 SAR/m2 average, with RYD-2016 overvalued at 13000 (44% above average).
records.ground_truth: Olaya: RYD-2014 undervalued (9000 < 12000 x 0.80=9600). Al_Naseem: RYD-2015 neither undervalued nor overvalued. KAFD: RYD-2016 overvalued (13000 > 9000 x 1.40=12600).
